title: trifolium hybridum
intro: Trifolium hybridum, also known as sweet clover or melilot, is a leguminous perennial plant that belongs to the pea family. The plant contains coumarin and other compounds with medicinal properties, such as antispasmodic and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Trifolium hybridum include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve digestion, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of Trifolium hybridum include tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used internally or externally to reap its medicinal benefits.
